      • Import Libraries

    • 2. MPU6050 Attitude Sensor

    • 4. PIR Motion Sensor

    • 6. Water Level Sensor

    • 10. RC522 RFID Module
    • 11. 0.96-inch OLED Display
    • 12. 4x4 Keypad
    • 15. Relay
    • 16. 7-segment Display

    • 19. Active/Passive Buzzer
